# W003 should not fire for $.User.Role when User has templatecheck:"nonil"
# tag, even inside a {{with}} or {{range}} block that changes dot.

check-templates -w
! stderr 'W003'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type User struct {
	Role     string
	Username string
}

type Owner struct {
	ID   int
	Name string
}

type Page struct {
	Title string
	User  *User  `templatecheck:"nonil"`
	Owner *Owner
}

func handleOwner(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "detail.gohtml", Page{
		Title: "Owner",
		User:  &User{Role: "admin", Username: "alice"},
		Owner: &Owner{ID: 1, Name: "Alice"},
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- detail.gohtml --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
{{with .Owner}}
<p>{{.Name}}</p>
{{if eq $.User.Role "admin"}}
<a href="/owners/{{.ID}}/edit">Edit</a>
{{end}}
{{end}}
